cases.description: Workspace prep before plan execution triggers the skill
cases.prompt: set up the workspace before we start the implementation plan
expectations: Gathers context (git status, git worktree list, task scope)
Recommends worktree vs simple branch with one-line reasoning
Waits for user confirmation before creating the workspace
Reports the selected path with setup commands

cases.description: Parallel feature work triggers worktree path
cases.prompt: I need to work on the auth migration without touching my current dirty tree
expectations: Recommends Path B (worktree) based on dirty-tree + isolation criteria
Installs dependencies in the new worktree using the detected package manager

cases.description: Small fix routes to Path A (simple branch)
cases.prompt: create a workspace for a tiny config tweak
expectations: Recommends Path A (simple branch) since scope is small and tree is clean
Runs `git checkout -b <name>` with a proper branch prefix (fix/, feature/, chore/)

cases.description: Finishing a branch does NOT trigger worktrees
cases.prompt: I'm done with this feature — how do I merge it?
expectations: Does NOT create a new workspace
Does NOT prompt for isolation strategy
